items.title: Multi-file builds: reject the invalid rule
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this C misconception? Only the .c file directly edited needs recompilation, even when a shared header changed its declarations.
hints: Compare each option with the exact language rule, standard boundary, and observable evidence in the authored draft.

feedback.correct: Correct. Track header dependencies and rebuild every affected translation unit before linking a coherent program.
feedback.incorrect: That option preserves the documented misconception. Track header dependencies and rebuild every affected translation unit before linking a coherent program.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned C correction instead of the documented misconception.

feedback.correct: Correct. The required checkpoint is 'header dependencies'.
